member.name: T:__RxMain.__RxProgram
member.summary: Modified Program class that ensures that the Ranorex System gets initialized and cleaned up correctly. This file is auto-generated during project build. This class will invoke the original 'Main' method implementation as needed.

member.summary: The entry point of the application.
member.param: Contains any number of command line arguments.
member.returns: The return value of the projects original 'Main' implementation.
